texto: Rituals are the kindergarten of religion. They are absolutely necessary for the world as it is now
autor: only we shall have to give people newer and fresh rituals. A party of thinkers must undertake to do this. Old rituals must be rejected and new ones substituted.
explicacao: Citação de only we shall have to give people newer and fresh rituals. A party of thinkers must undertake to do this. Old rituals must be rejected and new ones substituted. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Rituals are the kindergarten of religion. They are absolutely necessary for the world as it is now” articula reflexao, swami-vivekananda, rituals em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
